transcript.text:
That just looks adorable
[This round meat over here]
[Is called Hwang Ji Sal (pork jowl)]
The texture is insane
[Dice Shoulder Blade]
[Black Pepper Cheek Meat]
[Crunchy Galbi (ribs)]
[All kinds of meat]
[This is all mine]
Can I also get spicy sujebi?
[What is this dish?]
[I wonder what it tastes like...]
[She loves it]
[Pork jowl+spicy sujebi...] [How will it tastes?]
Hello everyone
[Filmed on Christmas Day (2021.12.25)] It's Christmas today

I've been home until now
And decided to come to try this unique meat restaurant
There was nothing to do at home by myself
Let's just eat something nice
It's located in this alleyway
[Sang Rok Su] [Seoul, Yongsan-gu]
The cut is very interesting It's round
Let's head inside!
The names are all very strange
Crunchy...? Black pepper?
Excuse me
What is Hwang Ji Sal?
It's Hang Jung Sal (pork jowl) but in a different dialect
If you purchase Hang Jung Sal from the markets, it's full of fat
But Hwang Ji Sal go through an extra process to cut out those fats
How about the crunchy galbi?

You know cartilages, right?
It's cartilage meat, but as a whole
The texture is nice
How about the dice shoulder blade?
It's pork shoulder blade shaped like a dice
-So it's square? -Yes
Then I'll take 10 servings of Hwang Ji Sal (pork jowl)
10... 10... 10?
Yes, 10 servings
And I'll take 1 order each of the ones we just mentioned
[What am I?]
[Round cut meat of pork jowl]
[Stack 'em up]
[Too many of them to make it look nice...]
[Some green tea powder on top]
[Other meats are also ready to be served]

-Here you go -Thank you
That looks pretty It's cute
Which one's which?
This is Hwang Ji Sal, Crunchy Galbi,
Black pepper cheek meat, Dice shoulder blade
Thank you
That's cool
Look at this
They're round Marblings look similar to Hang Jung Sal
They have green tea powder on top
There are butcher shops that cut round meats of pork jowl like this
It's like that but frozen
Fiddleheads here to grill
Interesting Grilled fiddleheads
It's going to be great
[Let's flip them over]

Very interesting
[Is she eating it all?]
[It might not be enough...]
It opens up like this It was frozen up into a circle
Hurry and cook
They should be ready, right? Let's cut it
Cuts well
A little undercooked is still fine, right? Let's try it
Small piece
What is this?!
The texture is insane
Hang Jung Sal has a strong greasy flavor
This is very juicy
Its consistency is more jelly-like
More flavorful
These are thicker Taking a bite of this as a whole is just...

Can't help but to say "wow"
Crispy outside, soft inside
I was feeling down not doing anything on Christmas day
Eating is the best!
[I love it]
Let's try it with the fiddleheads
They almost look fried
Chewy and crispy
That's tasty
Just by itself too
Fried fiddleheads?
Crispy!
The texture is top-notch
I started liking meat after eating pork jowl
So delicious
[Trying to get her a new grill] Thank you

We have 4 layers of tin foil You just need to remove them for a grill change
Thank you
I really want to try this Dice shoulder blade
All on top
This over here is the black pepper cheek meat
Looks like cheek meat
The marbling on it is a little different
Some of these on here too
More cheek meat too
I can just tell how tender they are by just cutting through them
Cuts with ease
Just how soft?
Let's try the cheek meat
So good!
Initial taste of black peppers
And that sticky texture from the cheek meat

Sticky and crunchy taste
That's crazy!
I'm so happy...
[Are you liking it?]
KBBQ on Christmas
What's the use of going outside to play?
Cheek meat is crazy!
It's crazy
So good
Dice shoulder blade
This one is very juicy The meat juice is yummy
Doesn't compare to Hang Jung Sal
It's that tender
The fat part is chewy
The meat part just melts from the tenderness
That expensive shoulder meat flavor

As good as beef cuts
Guys, this tastes so good
What do I do?
[What do you do? We're getting tortured through a video]
[3 pieces on the lettuce leaf]
[Wait... 4 pieces]
[She's about to cry]
[Self-made skewer]
[Let's get a quick grill change]
This is the crunchy galbi (ribs)
Cartilages are usually served in small bits
But these are different
[That looks... scary]
This is all mine
4 pieces with ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
Garlic,

Garlic leek,
[Yes, we're getting tortured]
Now that they're almost ready
Waiting sucks, right?
So pour the rest
Thank you Cook it like this?
There's a whole kimchi in here
Thank you
I really wonder what these taste like
[Crunch crunch]
It's just like how they serve cartilages here
A lot of different textures Crunchiness and tenderness
Small bits of cartilages inside
A group of cartilages
They feel smaller
Delish

[Kimchi stew starts to boil]
Whole-kimchi stew
Should I put some pork jowl in here?
[Do whatever as you please]
Let's make it a meat stew
Cook it up
[Busy with the stew]
[Busy grilling meat]
I need a grill change
Double tong skill
[Making a mess]
[Kimchi stew laundry]
What is this?! When did this happen?
[Embarrassed? Just laugh]
I can do it,
Thank you...

[A little careless, but still good at grilling meat]
[Keep the grill going]
Let's try the stew
It's like braised kimchi
Excellent
[She fell in love with kimchi stew]
Not too sour, not too sweet It's perfect
[She then ate without saying a word]
How's the texture like this?
On Christmas day...
I never get to play
Excuse me
-Can you guys do the spicy sujebi right now? -Yes
I'll take 1 order of that, please
What exactly is it?
Similar to spicy cold noodles

You can wrap it with meat
-Oh, you eat it with meat? -Yes
Yes I'll take 1 of that Thank you
[Spicy sauce with hand-pulled pasta]
[And mix it up!]
[Finish it up with all kinds of garnishes]
Thank you
What's this? It looks interesting
This isn't what I was expecting
Take this... And a bite
I've never had anything like it
[Wrap the meat with it this time]
That's tasty!
It's that sweet & sour spicy sauce that we all know
With some hand-pulled pasta
It's warm in here, but

You can feel the cold air every time the door opens It's so cold these days
This really can't go wrong
Pine bud drink They have these here
I've never had it before
I heard it's a hit or a miss
What is this?!
[And you take another swig?]
[This scene is not replayed]
[So do you like it or not!]
That's weird
You drank everything
[You have to get rid of it one way or the other]
This place usually has a long wait
But since it's Christmas, we got the favor in our hands
We picked the right day to come
The spicy sujebi acts as a great palate cleanser if the meat gets too greasy

There's not much left...
[Because you're eating everything]
Last piece of pork jowl!
We have plum juice as well
How come?!
-We bought it just for you -Really?!
Thank you
[Hehe]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
